text: You're not a beginner, you're just inconsistent. Discipline is what separates you from your excuses. Every rep at the gym is a chance to prove yourself.
decision_reason: Directly addresses the audience's inconsistency and lack of discipline, using a tough-love tone to provoke action.

text: I'm on day 10 of getting back to the gym and it's been a grind. But every sweat drop reminds me that I'm one step closer to my dreams. What's driving you to keep pushing forward?
decision_reason: Shares a personal story of struggle and perseverance, using a motivational tone to inspire the audience to keep pushing forward.

text: Discipline is not about being perfect, it's about being present. Every rep, every sweat drop, is a chance to show up and prove to yourself that you're worthy of your dreams.
decision_reason: Offers a compassionate and nuanced view of discipline, reframing it as a chance to show up and prove oneself worthy of their dreams.
